name: Nish Kumar
bio: Nish Kumar is a British stand-up comedian and presenter raised in Croydon, south London, known for politically engaged material. He performed five solo shows at the Edinburgh Fringe, two of which were nominated for the festivals top award, and became widely known as host of the satirical BBC programme The Mash Report. He co-hosts the political podcast Pod Save the UK.

timeline.ev: Begins performing as a solo stand-up
Edinburgh Comedy Award nomination for Best Show
Second Best Show nomination at Edinburgh
Becomes host of The Mash Report
Co-launches Pod Save the UK podcast

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Show nomination (2015)
Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Show nomination (2016)

Its In Your Nature To Destroy Yourselves Part 2
